children.text: Welcome to Spok Mobile! The Spok Mobile team is excited to get you started using the latest version of our secure messaging application. Shortly after receiving this message, you will receive a series of messages that will walk you through some of the application's features. There are many new features that we are excited to show you, so let's get started!

Setting Up Your Profile: The Spok Mobile application now gives you the ability to personalize your experience in the application by updating your profile information. By clicking on the 'Profile' option in the drawer, you can update your name, password, and profile picture.

Inviting Friends: By clicking on the 'Invite' link in the drawer, you can invite your friends, family, co-workers, and any other contacts to join Spok Mobile. By using the Spok Mobile application to communicate with your contacts, you will know that the information that you are sending and receiving is encrypted and secure.

Sending Messages: The Spok Mobile application allows you to securely send encrypted messages to other Spok Mobile users. You can send messages in the application by clicking on the 'Messages' link in the drawer, clicking the 'Compose' button, and then composing the message that you would like to send.

Finding Help: To make using the application fast and easy for you, the Spok Mobile team has created text and videos to ensure that you know how to use all of the applicationís features. This information can be accessed by clicking on the 'Help' option in the drawer.
